summary: Critic's final-sweep flagged a Sev 2b prose-coverage gap (esc-001): the v1.7 Coverage-Required-Fields rule requires every coverage-required prose field to have at least one assertion whose `covers` field names it back. sections-v1.json#sections[].charter (x4), sections-v1.json#sections[].out_of_scope[] items (x4 sections), and every contract interface method/field plus `.notes` across the 4 contracts had zero direct `covers` pointers, even though the corresponding behaviors are honored by the integrated artifact. Resolution is purely additive: author new structured assertions whose `covers` field names each previously-uncovered prose field. No product code changes, no contract changes, no Builder re-dispatch. The new assertion set is delivered as `decisions/technical-discovery/sections-v2.json` (a full new version per append-only file_schemas.md rule), preserving all original v1 content and adding two parallel collections: `section_coverage_assertions[]` (covering each section charter and each per-section out_of_scope item) and `contract_coverage_assertions[]` (covering each contract interface method/field/shape and `.notes` block).

section-1.rationale: No section-1 product code changes. data-fetcher.js already implements fetchEarthquakes with the contracted shape and is verified by S1.A1-A5. The remediation is documentation-shape: new assertions added in sections-v2.json reference section-1 charter / out_of_scope / contract surface but make no code demand the build does not already meet. No re-dispatch needed.

section-2.rationale: No section-2 product code changes. map.js already exposes mount(), magnitudeColor(), magnitudeRadius() with the contracted signatures and is verified by S2.A1-A6. New coverage assertions for section-2 charter, per-section out_of_scope items, and contract.section-2--section-3 surface are documentation-only. No re-dispatch needed.

section-3.rationale: No section-3 product code changes. index.html / main.js / styles.css already implement page shell, legend, error banner, and DOMContentLoaded bootstrap and are verified by S3.A1-A5. New coverage assertions for section-3 charter and per-section out_of_scope items are documentation-only. No re-dispatch needed.

section-4.rationale: No section-4 product code changes. Edge-case testing harness configuration is unchanged and remains verified by S4.A1-A3. New coverage assertions for section-4 charter, per-section out_of_scope items, and contract.integrator--section-4 surface are documentation-only. No re-dispatch needed.

next_step: Return to Coordinator for Critic re-sweep against the augmented coverage set in sections-v2.json. No rebuild needed.
